product_overview: Signet is a premium AI-powered resume builder that helps users create, refine, and manage professional resumes through a guided editor, dashboard, and public landing experience. It focuses on turning career history into polished resumes that can be saved, exported, and managed from one account.
core_goals: Discover the product and start using it from the public landing page
View a personalized dashboard for account activity and navigation
Create, edit, save, and export resumes
Browse, create, and delete resumes from the resume management area

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing page that introduces the product and guides visitors into the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the product overview and features -> Click Get Started or Login -> Arrive at /login

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email and password sign-in and sign-up experience for accessing the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit sign in form -> Access the authenticated app
Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit sign up form -> Access the authenticated app

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated home area that shows overview information and provides navigation to other parts of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View activity overview and account summary -> Select navigation link to resume management -> Arrive at /slates
Navigate to /dashboard -> View activity overview and account summary -> Select navigation link to settings or other available sections -> Navigate to the chosen area

features.name: Resume Management
features.description: Authenticated page for viewing, creating, and deleting resumes.
user_flows: Navigate to /slates -> View the list of resumes -> Create a new resume -> Open the resume editor
Navigate to /slates -> View the list of resumes -> Delete an existing resume -> See the list update

features.name: Resume Editor
features.description: Authenticated resume-building workspace for editing personal details and experience, then saving or exporting the resume.
user_flows: Navigate to /forge/new -> Edit personal details -> Add work experience -> Save resume -> Export resume
Navigate to /forge/new -> Edit personal details -> Add work experience -> Save resume -> Return to the resume list after saving

routes.description: TRPC backend API for data management

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public facing landing page explaining the product
user_interactions: Click Get Started or Login buttons to navigate to login page

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login or sign up via Supabase auth
user_interactions: Click Sign in or Sign up button

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard to view metrics and manage data
user_interactions: Click navigation links to Slates, Applications, Settings
